Name: Vignette
Description: Post-processing optical effect that darkens or tints the edges of the screen to simulate lens light falloff, emphasizing the center of the image and enhancing focus or cinematic framing.

Fields.Name: Color
Fields.Description: Color tint applied to the vignette effect, controlling the hue of edge darkening or stylized peripheral coloration.

Fields.ID: 中心からの位置オフセット
Fields.Name: Offset from Center
Fields.Description: Shifts the vignette center away from the screen midpoint, allowing asymmetrical darkening effects for stylized framing.

Fields.ID: グラデーション部の狭さ倍率
Fields.Name: Narrowing of Gradient Area
Fields.Description: Controls the width of the transition zone between clear center and darkened edges, affecting vignette sharpness and falloff steepness.
